classification.category_basis: 用于识别机械结构尺寸类图纸，包括电机/零部件外形轮廓、长宽高、轴径、轴长、键槽、法兰、安装孔、孔距、定位尺寸、三视图、剖视图、局部放大视图、公差、形位公差、基准符号、连接器/线缆/插头的物理安装位置或外形位置。若图中仅展示连接器型号、端子型号、线束走向、接口外形位置，但没有明确的引脚编号、针脚功能、线色或接线表，也归入本类。

classification.category_basis: 用于识别机械结构尺寸类图纸，包括电机/零部件外形轮廓、长宽高、轴径、轴长、键槽、法兰、安装孔、孔距、定位尺寸、三视图、剖视图、局部放大视图、公差、形位公差、基准符号、连接器/线缆/插头的物理安装位置或外形位置。若图中仅展示连接器型号、端子型号、线束走向、接口外形位置，但没有明确的引脚编号、针脚功能、线色或接线表，也归入本类。
classification.reason: 目标框位于完整机械图右侧黄色标注区域，是电机参数表，包含'步距角(±5%)'、'额定相电流'、'相电阻(20℃)'、'保持力矩/(2相)'、'电机重量'等与电机规格及图纸说明相关的项目；未出现扭矩转速曲线或连接器针脚功能定义，因此在给定类别中最接近机械尺寸类图纸信息。

classification.category_basis:
用于识别动力连接器或电源接口的针脚/接线定义，包括动力接口 pinout、引脚编号与针脚功能对应关系、针脚名称、U/V/W/PE、L/N/PE、DC+/DC-、P+/P-、Brake+/Brake-、制动器、电源正负极、保护地、相线、线色、线径、端子号、接线说明、连接器针位图、针脚分配表。

必须同时满足：
1. 出现连接器针脚、端子或接口信息；
2. 至少有一个针脚编号与功能、信号名、线色、线序、电源极性、相线、保护地或接线关系对应。

仅有引脚编号，但没有功能定义，不应归入本类。
仅出现 Power Wire、Housing、Terminal、连接器型号、端子型号、线束走向、连接器安装位置、接插件外形图、插头/插座物料信息时，不应归入本类。
仅显示 1/2/3/4 等孔位编号和 Housing/Terminal 型号，应归入 connector_housing_terminal 或 connector_structure，不应归入 power_connector_pinout。
classification.reason: 目标框内是电机励磁顺序表，列出'黑 A+'、'绿 A−'、'红 B+'、'蓝 B−'等线色与绕组相位端子的对应关系，并用'+'、'−'表示顺时针和逆时针励磁极性顺序，属于电机动力相线接线定义，最接近动力连接器针脚定义。

text_annotations.correction_note: OCR detected '人' with low confidence (0.58) and angled text (160.91°). Visual inspection of target image shows 'A-' label at this position, consistent with electrical schematic convention pairing with A+ above.
OCR detected '叶' (0.47 conf) at bottom-left terminal. Context and visual inspection suggest B+ terminal label.
OCR detected 'B' (0.65 conf). Position at bottom-right terminal suggests B- to pair with B+.

terminology_notes: Stepper motor wiring convention: A+/A- and B+/B- represent two phase windings
translation_notes: OCR misread '人' and '叶' due to font/angle, corrected based on electrical schematic context

dimension_records.reason: Clear electrical terminal designation for stepper motor phase A positive
Electrical terminal designation for stepper motor phase A negative, OCR confidence low but context strongly supports interpretation
Standard electrical schematic symbol for motor component
Electrical terminal designation for stepper motor phase B positive, inferred from position and context
Electrical terminal designation for stepper motor phase B negative, inferred from OCR 'B' and position

engineering_summary.connector_considerations: Four-wire bipolar stepper motor connection: A+, A-, B+, B-. Motor designated as 'M'. Schematic shows spring mechanism and coil representation typical of stepper motor internal structure.
engineering_summary.missing_or_unresolved_data: OCR detected 'POM' (ocr_002, conf 0.32), 'N' (ocr_003, conf 0.93), second 'M' (ocr_006, conf 0.62), '1' (ocr_009, conf 0.25), and 'C' (ocr_010, conf 0.66) which do not correspond to clear visible text in target image and may be noise or artifacts from coil/spring line art.

unresolved_items.reason: Low confidence (0.32), appears to be misread from coil/spring graphic elements, no corresponding visible text label
Medium confidence (0.93) but visually overlaps with 'M' designation area. May be partial read or artifact. No independent 'N' label visible in schematic.
unresolved_items.suggested_action: Discard as duplicate/overlap artifact with ocr_004 'M'

unresolved_items.reason: Lower confidence (0.62) 'M' detected in lower coil area. May be repeated motor designation or misread from coil lines.
unresolved_items.suggested_action: Discard as redundant or artifact; primary motor designation already captured in T003

unresolved_items.reason: Very low confidence (0.25), overlaps with bottom terminal area. No visible '1' label in target image.
Medium confidence (0.66), angled text (39.81°), position near bottom-right terminal. No clear 'C' designation visible; may be misread terminal connector shape.

classification.reason: 目标框内为工程图通用公差表，包含可见标题'线性公差'、'角度公差'以及范围与允许偏差，如'0～3 ±0.2'、'120～400 ±15’'，用于尺寸与角度公差说明，属于机械尺寸图纸信息。

quality_control.origin_src_semantics: 5x crop before structure border trim; backend original data image
quality_control.target_src_semantics: structure-only crop after border trim; backend processed data image

items: 抽查 5x 裁切图清晰度和结构图去边效果
抽查 AI 命名、分类、标签合并、完整翻译和简单翻译质量
抽查 v2 JSON 是否满足后台拆解对比和人工复核需要
